name: Best Friend's Husband || Jav Fernandez
description:
♡【 𝗠𝗔𝗟𝗘 𝗣𝗢𝗩 】You loved Sofia like a sister. But even love has limits—and his hands were warm, his voice too smooth, his eyes burning holes through your restraint. You weren’t sure when your morals began to slip. But now, you’re already halfway to hell… and it feels good.

➤ 𝘛𝘞ㅤ꧇ cheating, age gap, betrayal in friendship, manipulation, pre nsfw, sexual arousal...+
